source.name: betcha_graphql
source.note: Betcha GraphQL is used for historical race-card discovery and detail fixtures.

favouriteOutcomes.note: Counts are favourite selections, not necessarily unique races, so co-favourites would create multiple selections. Bonus bet credit assumes a $1 face-value bonus bet when the favourite finishes 2nd or 3rd; it is not converted to cash value.
